data.content:
Planning note for overview tags and filters

Scope: implement the overview-only UI and helper behavior for tag badges, tag filtering, and setlist filtering. Keep changes scoped to the overview components/helpers and focused tests; do not alter kno workflows or backend plan semantics.

Proposed file changes:
1. src/lib/beat-state-overview-filters.ts
   - Add/keep pure helpers for overview-visible beat labels, tag option aggregation, setlist option construction, label formatting, repo-aware setlist ids, and combined filtering.
   - Treat Beat.labels as user-visible tags after trimming, de-duping case-insensitively, and excluding internal/bookkeeping labels such as workflow/stage labels from wave-slugs plus branch:, commit:, and parent:.
   - Format setlist labels as "<plan artifact id> <first 40 chars of objective/summary>", falling back to just the id when no title/summary text exists.
   - Match setlist membership by Beat.id or Beat.aliases against plan.plan.beatIds. For all-repo data, preserve repoPath in option ids so equal plan ids from different repos do not collide.
   - Combine filters with AND across categories and OR within a category: selected tags match any selected tag, selected setlists match any selected setlist, and selecting both categories returns their intersection. Empty category selections should be no-ops.

2. src/components/use-overview-setlist-filter-options.ts
   - Build the distinct repo path list from overview beats using their _repoPath metadata.
   - Fetch /api/plans summaries per repo with React Query and convert successful responses into setlist filter options.
   - Surface loading state so the toolbar can show a loading/empty setlist state without silently hiding the control.

3. src/components/use-beat-overview-filters.ts
   - Own selected tag and setlist ids as local overview state.
   - Prune selections when options disappear.
   - Return filteredBeats and handlers for toggling/clearing filters.

4. src/components/beat-overview-filter-toolbar.tsx
   - Add compact dropdown controls for multi-select Tags and Setlists, using existing UI dropdown/button primitives and lucide Tag/ListMusic/X icons.
   - Show counts on selected controls and a Clear action when any filters are active.
   - Keep layout compact beside state tabs and avoid text overflow with truncation/title attributes.

5. src/components/beat-state-overview.tsx and src/components/beat-state-overview-matrix.tsx
   - Wire the filter hook into BeatStateOverview before tab construction and grouping so state-tab counts and visible columns reflect filtered beats.
   - Pass toolbarEnd into the overview matrix header next to the existing tabs.
   - Preserve existing empty-state behavior: no beats from loading/query remains handled by BeatStateOverviewScreen; filtered-away content should naturally use the matrix empty state/empty columns.

6. src/components/beat-overview-tile.tsx
   - Render overview-visible Beat.labels as compact, wrapped badges on each tile when present.
   - Hide internal labels from the tile tag surface.

Focused tests:
- src/lib/__tests__/beat-state-overview-filters.test.ts should cover user-visible tag extraction, tag option counts/sorting, setlist label truncation/fallback, repo-aware option ids, alias/id membership matching, and combined tag+setlist filtering semantics.
- src/components/__tests__/beat-overview-tile.test.ts should render a tile to static markup and assert visible tags render while internal labels do not.
- If component-level filter interaction tests are added, keep them narrow and mock plan summaries/query state rather than touching real network/fs, in line with the hermetic test policy.

Verification plan:
- bun install --frozen-lockfile if working from a fresh worktree without node_modules.
- bun run test -- src/lib/__tests__/beat-state-overview-filters.test.ts src/components/__tests__/beat-overview-tile.test.ts
- bun run lint
- bunx tsc --noEmit
- bun run test
- bun run build

Complexity: medium. The behavior is mostly pure helper logic and UI wiring, but setlist filtering crosses plan-summary API data, repo scoping, aliases, and tab grouping.

Risks and mitigations:
- Internal labels leaking as user tags: centralize filtering in overviewVisibleBeatTags and reuse it for both badges and tag options.
- Plan id collisions across repositories: include repoPath in setlist option ids and compare repoPath before membership checks when available.
- Stale selected filters hiding all beats after data refresh: prune selected ids against current option ids.
- Overview tab regressions: apply filtering before buildOverviewStateTabs/groupOverviewBeatsByState so existing tab behavior remains authoritative.
- File-size limits: keep new helper/hook/toolbar code split across small files; current target files are all below 500 lines.

No child knots are required for this implementation.
